title: Northwind Harbor · 1988 · seven mornings
notes: Entries reveal when their token lands in GauntletState.lore_tokens_revealed (hosts emit on finished; conditional tokens per manifest). Schema matches pirate_summer/scrapbook.json.

entries.title: Seven mornings at the harbor
entries.blurb: The dog met you at the gate every morning. The chains needed closing before the horn. You did the week the way the week wanted doing.

entries.title: The 1976 poster
entries.blurb: Behind the harbormaster's shed, sun-bleached: CAMP SWEETGUM · SUMMER 1976. Twelve years old when you found it, and already nobody would talk about it.

entries.title: THE GOOD WEEK
entries.blurb: Every chain closed before every horn, seven for seven. The harbor has no reward for this. The dog knew, though.
